'''Tuber''' was the nickname [[Anakin Solo]] gave to an elder [[Dantari]] tribesman that he encountered on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]] in [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]], during the early part of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]].

Tuber would occasionally bring [[Blba tree/Legends|
blba]] firewood to Anakin and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]] at their camp, looking to trade it for [[vincha]] roots or small trinkets, which Tuber then braided into his hair. He was distinguished from the rest of his tribe of Dantari by the crude [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] emblem that had been [[Tattoo/Legends|tattooed]] onto his chest.

Tuber, along with his tribe of Dantari, were briefly captured and tortured by the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Anakin, however, was able to rescue the natives from Vong captivity. Due to communication barriers, Anakin used [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to project his thoughts into the mind of Tuber, telling him to take his tribe to safety within the deep mountain valleys of Dantooine, thinking that the valley, with its long grasses and vincha roots by the dozens would perhaps be sanctuary for the Dantari during the impending invasion of Dantooine by the extragalactic aliens.
